creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
avilla      2011-10-16 22:55:01 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
    deskutils/strigi     Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    textproc/raptor      Makefile pkg-plist 
    textproc/raptor2     Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    textproc/rasqal      Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    textproc/redland     Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    textproc/redland-bindings Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    textproc/soprano     Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    x11-toolkits/shared-desktop-ontologies Makefile distinfo 
  Added files:
    textproc/raptor/files patch-configure 
  Removed files:
    textproc/redland/files patch-Makefile.in 
  Log:
  - Stop installing the rapper binary with raptor and bump PORTREVISION.
  - Update raptor2 to 2.0.4.
  - Update rasqal to 0.9.27.
  - Update redland to 1.0.14.
  - Update redland-bindings to 1.0.13.1.
  - Update shared-desktop-ontologies to 0.8.0. [1]
  - Update soprano to 2.7.0 and disable clucene indexer.
  - Update strigi to 0.7.6.
  
  PR:             157022 [1]
  Submitted by:   rakuco [1]
